title: Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling
summary: v0.4 pivots after v0.3 (aaddd32) into platform-facing delivery: shared web auth and beskid_web_common, beskid_tracker as the roadmap product (SQLite source of truth with scoped GitHub sync), beskid_nexus hosting, and superrepo CI/CD with Coolify deploy. Through ee88edf (2026-05-26–06-07) the line lands auth hub autopairing, hub launcher across services, tracker container CI, observability packages, kanban UX fixes, and ongoing corelib/compiler stabilization toward v0.4 closure.
theme: Auth hub, web_common, tracker, nexus, CI/CD, corelib, editor DX

cutoff.rationale: Starts at v0.3 cut-off tip aaddd32 (2026-05-25). Initial v0.4 burst (2026-05-26–27) lands tracker submodule, hub/trudoc extraction, nexus CI, and auth scaffold through c8e5fc4. May 29–June 7 extends auth/tracker production hardening (801f1e2–ee88edf): autopairing, package sync, container CI, SQLite tracker model, and BSOL stability on main.
